response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but their primary expertise lies in web and mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Ember.js) rather than C++ or industrial automation. While they have some C++ experience (National Instruments, embedded systems), it is not recent or deep enough for a mid-senior C++ developer role. Their lack of cloud (Azure) and industrial protocol experience (Modbus, OPC UA) further reduces their fit.
strengths: Strong multi-language adaptability (C++, D, Java, TypeScript, etc.)
Experience with high-performance systems (low-latency apps, real-time metadata processing)
Proven track record in open-source contributions and mentorship (e.g., Altom Consulting, FOSS4G talks)
concerns: Limited recent and deep C++ experience (last significant C++ work was in 2015)
No direct experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
Lacks cloud platform exposure (Azure) and secure development lifecycle (SDL) per IEC 62443
